title: pluchea marilandica
intro: Pluchea marilandica, also known as wild ergot or American fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, which is native to North America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pluchea marilandica include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of allergies and asthma, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
